sentences.target: Je retrouve mon soulier sous le canapé.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁə.tʁuv mɔ̃ su.lje su lə ka.na.pe/

translations.fr: Je retrouve mon soulier sous le canapé.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁə.tʁuv mɔ̃ su.lje su lə ka.na.pe/
translations.en: I find my shoe under the couch.
translations.es: Encuentro mi zapato debajo del sofá.
translations.de: Ich finde meinen Schuh unter dem Sofa.
translations.it: Trovo la mia scarpa sotto il divano.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在沙发下面找到了我的鞋子。
translations.yue: 我喺梳化底搵返我嘅鞋。
translations.ru: Я нашёл свой ботинок под диваном.
translations.pt: Encontro meu sapato debaixo do sofá.
translations.he: אני מוצא את הנעל שלי מתחת לספה.
translations.vi: Tôi tìm thấy chiếc giày của mình dưới ghế sofa.
translations.nl: Ik vind mijn schoen onder de bank.
translations.uk: Я знаходжу свій черевик під диваном.
translations.hu: Megtalálom a cipőmet a kanapé alatt.
translations.hi: मुझे मेरा जूता सोफ़े के नीचे मिलता है।
translations.el: Βρίσκω το παπούτσι μου κάτω από τον καναπέ.
translations.nb: Jeg finner skoen min under sofaen.
translations.id: Saya menemukan sepatu saya di bawah sofa.
translations.sv: Jag hittar min sko under soffan.
translations.da: Jeg finder min sko under sofaen.
translations.ja: ソファの下で自分の靴を見つけた。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject personal pronoun; clitic in preverbal position functioning as the subject of the verb.
Main lexical verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; denotes recovering or finding something again.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, masculine singular; modifies ‘soulier’ indicating possession.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘retrouve’.
Preposition introducing a spatial prepositional phrase; takes ‘le canapé’ as its complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘canapé’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘sous’.

sentences.target: Tu as laissé ton soulier chez moi.
sentences.reading: /ty a lɛ.se tɔ̃ su.lje ʃe mwa/

translations.fr: Tu as laissé ton soulier chez moi.
translations.ipa: /ty a lɛ.se tɔ̃ su.lje ʃe mwa/
translations.en: You left your shoe at my place.
translations.es: Dejaste tu zapato en mi casa.
translations.de: Du hast deinen Schuh bei mir gelassen.
translations.it: Hai lasciato la tua scarpa a casa mia.
translations.ko: 우리 집에 네 신발을 두고 갔어.
translations.yue: 你喺我屋企遺低咗你嘅鞋。
translations.ru: Ты оставил свой ботинок у меня.
translations.pt: Você deixou seu sapato na minha casa.
translations.vi: Bạn đã để quên chiếc giày của mình ở nhà tôi.
translations.nl: Je hebt je schoen bij mij laten liggen.
translations.uk: Ти залишив свій черевик у мене вдома.
translations.hi: तुमने अपना जूता मेरे घर पर छोड़ दिया।
translations.el: Άφησες το παπούτσι σου στο σπίτι μου.
translations.nb: Du har lagt igjen skoen din hos meg.
translations.id: Kamu meninggalkan sepatumu di rumah saya.
translations.sv: Du lämnade din sko hos mig.
translations.ro: Ai lăsat pantoful tău la mine.
translations.cs: Nechal jsi u mě svou botu.
translations.da: Du har efterladt din sko hos mig.
translations.ja: あなたは私の家に靴を置いていった。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary ‘avoir’, present indicative, 2nd person singular; forms the passé composé with the past participle ‘laissé’.
Past participle of ‘laisser’; main verb in compound past with ‘as’; takes ‘ton soulier’ as direct object. No agreement since the object follows.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, masculine singular; modifies ‘soulier’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘laissé’.
Preposition meaning ‘at the home/establishment of’; introduces the prepositional complement ‘moi’.
Stressed personal pronoun, 1st person singular; object of the preposition ‘chez’.

sentences.target: Ce soulier est trop grand pour elle.
sentences.reading: /sə su.lje ɛ tʁo ɡʁɑ̃ puʁ ɛl/

translations.fr: Ce soulier est trop grand pour elle.
translations.ipa: /sə su.lje ɛ tʁo ɡʁɑ̃ puʁ ɛl/
translations.en: This shoe is too big for her.
translations.es: Este zapato le queda demasiado grande.
translations.de: Dieser Schuh ist zu groß für sie.
translations.it: Questa scarpa è troppo grande per lei.
translations.zh-Hans: 这只鞋对她来说太大了。
translations.pt: Este sapato é grande demais para ela.
translations.vi: Đôi giày này quá rộng với cô ấy.
translations.nl: Deze schoen is te groot voor haar.
translations.hu: Ez a cipő túl nagy neki.
translations.hi: यह जूता उसके लिए बहुत बड़ा है।
translations.pl: Ten but jest dla niej za duży.
translations.el: Αυτό το παπούτσι είναι πολύ μεγάλο για εκείνη.
translations.nb: Denne skoen er for stor for henne.
translations.sv: Den här skon är för stor för henne.
translations.ro: Pantoful acesta este prea mare pentru ea.
translations.cs: Tato bota je pro ni příliš velká.
translations.da: Denne sko er for stor til hende.
translations.fi: Tämä kenkä on hänelle liian suuri.
translations.ja: この靴は彼女には大きすぎる。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; specifies the noun ‘soulier’.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary ‘être’, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Adverb of degree; intensifies the adjective ‘grand’.
Adjective, masculine singular; predicative complement after the copula, modified by ‘trop’.
Preposition introducing a beneficiary/target phrase; governs the pronoun ‘elle’.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine; disjunct form used as object of the preposition ‘pour’.

sentences.target: On a perdu un soulier dans le parc.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a pɛʁ.dy œ̃ su.lje dɑ̃ lə paʁk/

translations.fr: On a perdu un soulier dans le parc.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a pɛʁ.dy œ̃ su.lje dɑ̃ lə paʁk/
translations.en: We lost a shoe in the park.
translations.es: Perdimos un zapato en el parque.
translations.de: Wir haben im Park einen Schuh verloren.
translations.it: Abbiamo perso una scarpa nel parco.
translations.ko: 우리는 공원에서 신발 한 짝을 잃어버렸어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在公园里丢了一只鞋。
translations.yue: 我哋喺公園度唔見咗一隻鞋。
translations.ru: Мы потеряли один ботинок в парке.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi làm mất một chiếc giày trong công viên.
translations.nl: We zijn een schoen kwijtgeraakt in het park.
translations.uk: Ми загубили один черевик у парку.
translations.hi: हमने पार्क में एक जूता खो दिया।
translations.nb: Vi mistet en sko i parken.
translations.id: Kami kehilangan sebuah sepatu di taman.
translations.sv: Vi tappade en sko i parken.
translations.ro: Am pierdut un pantof în parc.
translations.cs: Ztratili jsme jednu botu v parku.
translations.da: Vi mistede en sko i parken.
translations.ja: 公園で靴を片方なくした。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun often used colloquially for ‘we’; 3rd person singular agreement.
Auxiliary ‘avoir’, present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms the passé composé with ‘perdu’.
Past participle of ‘perdre’; main verb in compound past with ‘a’; takes ‘un soulier’ as its direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner for ‘soulier’, marking indefiniteness.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘perdu’.
Preposition introducing a locative phrase; governs ‘le parc’.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘parc’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘dans’, indicating location.

Dejaste tu zapato en mi casa.
Este zapato le queda demasiado grande.
Perdimos un zapato en el parque.

Denne skoen er for stor for henne.
Vi mistet en sko i parken.

Kamu meninggalkan sepatumu di rumah saya.

Du lämnade din sko hos mig.

Am pierdut un pantof în parc.
cs: Nechal jsi u mě svou botu.

Denne sko er for stor til hende.
